FusionMINERful Discovery — 20 Logs

Classes structured (n=7) / semi-structured (n=7) / loosely-structured (n=6). One run per log, uniform default configuration. For each log both models rendered by FusionMINERful are shown: the hybrid model (compact view, red boxes = procedural transitions, dashed boxes = declaratively constrained activities) and the PNwA (the actual Petri net with augmentations: places as circles, transitions as boxes, black boxes = silent transitions, dashed arcs = declarative augmentations with cardinality). Next to them are the metrics that the fusion miner delivers. 20/20 runs succeeded.

Discovery configuration (all 20 logs)
declare_support1.0
declare_alpha1.0
activity_entropy0.4
resilience0.1
im_fitness0.2
size_multiplicator1
cut / prune / negativeTrue / True / True
dependency_threshold0.9
relative_to_best_threshold (noise)0.05
l1l / l2l / long_dist threshold0.9 / 0.9 / 0.9
precision_valid_samples / seed5000 / 42

Aggregation & distribution per class

Mean ± standard deviation of the FusionMINERful metrics per structuredness class. Median and range are in aggregates_per_class.csv.

Fitness = MPCC replay on the PNwA (scope pnwa). Precision = AlignmentPrecGen on the PNwA. CFC = Cardoso control-flow complexity on the procedural Petri-net backbone. PNwA counts refer to the exported Petri net with augmentations.
